b:T353d6,<div class="specification">
<p>This light micrograph shows skeletal muscle.</p>
<p style="text-align: center;"><img src="data:image/png;base64,"/></p>
<p style="text-align: center;">[Source: adapted from https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Skeletal_muscle#/media/File:Skeletal_<br/>muscle_%E6%A8%AA%E7%BA%B9%E8%82%8C1.JPG, Urana/ 乌拉跨氪]</p>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Identify the dark structure indicated by I.</p>
<div class="marks">[1]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">a.i.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Identify the protein producing the thick filament in the dark band indicated by II.</p>
<div class="marks">[1]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">a.ii.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Identify the structure indicated by III.</p>
<div class="marks">[1]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">a.iii.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Discuss whether the tissue shown in the micrograph consists of cells or not.</p>
<div class="marks">[2]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Explain how calcium is involved in muscle contraction.</p>
<div class="marks">[3]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">c.</div>
</div>c:T57c,<div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>nucleus ✔</p>
<div class="question_part_label">a.i.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>myosin ✔</p>
<div class="question_part_label">a.ii.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>muscle fibre/muscle cell ✔</p>
<p><em>Reject myofibril because it would be much narrower – diameter </em></p>
<div class="question_part_label">a.iii.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>a. «muscle fibres are» multinucleate/contain many nuclei «whereas cells are expected to have only one/so muscle fibers are an exception to the cell theory» ✔</p>
<p>b. one cell membrane/sarcolemma enclosing a whole muscle fibre «as expected for cells» ✔</p>
<p>c. very large/much larger/longer/than most cells ✔</p>
<p>d. muscle fibres formed by fusion of cells/are syncytia ✔</p>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>a. action potential/nerve impulse causes release of calcium ✔</p>
<p>b. from sarcoplasmic reticulum/specialized endoplasmic reticulum ✔</p>
<p>c. binds to troponin ✔</p>
<p>d. causes tropomyosin to move/be removed «from binding sites» ✔</p>
<p>e. exposes myosin-binding sites on actin/allows myosin «heads» to bind to actin ✔</p>
<div class="question_part_label">c.</div>
</div>2:["$","article",null,{"className":"q-page","children":[["$","p",null,{"style":{"margin":0},"children":["$","$L6",null,{"href":"/subject/biology/topic/11/","children":["← back to ","Biology"," topic ","11"]}]}],["$","h1",null,{"children":"19N.2.HL.TZ0.5"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-meta","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"tag","children":"pestle"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"Biology"}],null,["$","span",null,{"children":"HL"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["Paper ","2"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"19N"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["· ","1-1-introduction-to-cells, 11-2-movement"]}],["$","a",null,{"href":"https://pestle.pages.dev/app/","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener","children":"source ↗"}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-content","dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$b"}}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Markscheme / solution"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$c"}}]]}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Examiners’ report"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">a.i.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">a.ii.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">a.iii.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">b.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">c.</div>\n</div>"}}]]}]]}]
